converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Laura Bryant papers
Bryant, Laura.
Dann, Hollis, 1861-1939.
Knapp, Katherine.
White, Karin Andreevna, 1893-1971.
Magill family.
White family.
2112
28.1 cubic feet. 28.1 cubic feet.
[ca. 1891]-1961. Papers, correspondence, books, diaries, notebooks, scrapbooks, clippings, programs, photographs. Papers include professional correspondence with colleagues, publishers, and others concerning textbooks; also, her teaching career in general. Collection material in English 2081816
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
K. Johnson
Date completed:
May 1962
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, May 2004
Date modified:
Jude Corina, October 2013
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Music teacher.
Laura Bryant taught singing and music in the Ithaca, New York, public schools, 1906-1950.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Papers include professional correspondence with colleagues, publishers, and others concerning the textbooks on which she collaborated with Hollis Dann and later Katherine Knapp (Let's Read Music: 1949), conferences of music educators, and her teaching career in general; personal letters from former students, friends, and family; and diaries (incomplete run) and notebooks. Also, scrapbooks of press notices concerning her own activities and other clippings relating to former students, Cornell personalities, and numerous other persons and subjects; Ithaca High School concert programs (2 vols., 1901-50), Cornell Dramatic Club programs (1925+), and Cornell music programs (1915+); Ithaca High School Choral Club correspondence and newspaper clippings (1923-40), miscellaneous concert and theater programs (1903+), and verse and lyrics. Also, unmounted programs and scores from Cornell Music Festivals (1907-20); albums of photographs and picture postcards, as well as substantial numbers of loose photographs, postcards, musical scores, and clippings; student grade books and roll books, reports, bulletins, music teachers' magazines, and other publications, and miscellaneous materials relating to her teaching in Ithaca schools and in summer sessions at Cornell, San Francisco State College, Utah State Agricultural College, Louisiana State University, and elsewhere; items pertaining to the Bryant family and to Miss Bryant's study and early work in Indiana, and other items.
Includes correspondence from Karin White and other members of the White and Magill families.
Cite As:
Laura Bryant papers, #2112. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scrapbooks. Photographs. Scores. Grade books. Diaries. Albums. Music teachers. Women -- Diaries. Women teachers. Singing -- Instruction and study. School music. Music -- Instruction and study. Music festivals. Bryant family. Cornell Dramatic Club Ithaca High School. Choral Club Louisiana State University San Francisco State College Utah State University

Scope and Contents
"Songs for Christmas," "Christmas Carols," "Lets Read Music," Lets Read More Music," "Sentence Songs for Little Singers," "Songs for Children"Diaries for 1946 , 1956 (part), 1948 , 1954 ,1946195619481954195526Sage Chapel Programs26Christmas cards27Photographs, teaching small children and alone28Chorus roll for194728Choral Club roll for1912-194828Glee Club roll for1906-194528Arrangements for boys' choir concert,1923-192928Scrapbook conatining bound copies of programs, inscription on cover "Thanksgiving Concert"195128Utah register195228Diary,195728MENC folder containing correspondence28Register,194328Address books28Roll book, Baptist Church choir28Notebook with names of Thanksgiving Reunion patronesses (2)28Diary from Western College,194728Alumni Glee Club address book28Correspondence,1950's28Scrapbook with further correspondence and lyrics28Notebook beginning in 1898, with records of singers189828Registers,19391944-194528Files and publications largely relating to music education29Scrolls19001902190730
